speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're brooming towards. All right, so she comes to a tumble. For this purpose, I'm going to have you two, since you're both pretty quick, roll initiative checks, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're gods, remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Remember that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's not great, but it's not bad. 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20 will hit. So what's the effect on that one, again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a strength saving throw or prone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you watch. No gunshot. Complete silence as you all begin to maneuver. You watch as the horse suddenly (neighs) and goes ass over tea kettle forward, jettisoning both Taryon and the rider from the horse into a neat roll. Since you have not moved, Tary, you make a full spill, skittering across the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (screams)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You suffer ten points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about the horse. Does he fall off?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, the horse is prone and still takes damage from the shot, so roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and also takes damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you shot it with...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I did. I really shot it. It didn't have a good day. Do I have enough...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll heal it so good!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to eat it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no horse left. Yeah, oh boy. That's 30 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 30 points of damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that a lot for a horse?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's my maximum damage with a single unaffected shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, as the horse skids over and hits the ground, it falls onto its side, and you watch its heavy breathing become still.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dinner!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm keeping a second shot. The second I see her head, I am taking a head shot on this girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make a perception check because you were down in the grass.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I lift my head up. What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't, because you are tied.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you see nothing. What were you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (whoosh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you (whoosh) up in the air. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm brooming.
